title: Cosmos Ambient Generator — generative drone pad that really plays
title_vi: Cosmos Ambient Generator — máy tạo nhạc nền ambient phát tiếng thật
summary: A self-contained generative ambient pad machine: layered detuned oscillator drones through slow filters with an LFO swell and a generated-impulse reverb evolve endlessly, while a slow nebula/aurora glow breathes with the chord changes. Zero deps; it PLAYS REAL SOUND via the Web Audio API on interaction, plus a silent deterministic looping visual demo for capture.
usage_notes: RUN: open index.html and CLICK to start — audio needs a user gesture; drag the mood controls (brightness/density) to shape the pad. KEY TECHNIQUES: stacked detuned oscillators → slow lowpass with an LFO-driven cutoff swell → convolver fed a synthesized impulse response, all under a low master gain with ramped envelopes; the nebula glow + drifting particles are driven by render(u) from the same seeded chord cycle. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 is SILENT and window.__seek(t) gives a deterministic seamless visual. TUNE: chord cycle, LFO rate, reverb length, palette.
summary_vi: Máy tạo nhạc nền ambient: nhiều lớp oscillator lệch tông qua filter chậm + reverb tự dựng, tiến hoá liên tục, kèm quầng sáng nebula 'thở' theo hợp âm. Không lib; mở ra bấm chuột là PHÁT TIẾNG thật bằng Web Audio, kèm demo hình câm deterministic để bắt GIF.
notes: Phase 3 — mở ra bấm chuột để nghe pad ambient; auto=1 thì câm, chỉ chạy visual.
